name: id-like-to-make
description: Chrome extension plus local bridge for running Cursor Agent from inside tabs.

scripts.concurrently: concurrently -n bridge,ext -c cyan,magenta "npm run watch:bridge" "npm run watch:extension"
scripts.tmetro: sh -c 'p=${PORT:-4317}; lsof -nP -tiTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true' && npm run dev
